title: Role-Based Access Control: How to Build an RBAC App with AI
summary: Demonstration of building a role-based access control event management system using Softr's AI Co-Builder, covering database generation, workflow automations, and permissions without re-prompting. The video compares Softr to Lovable and Replit for no-code application development.
